---
title: "Full Width Div Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        - ['#wideblock\(side: "outer"\)', '#wideblock\(side: "both"\)', '#wideblock\(side: "inner"\)']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

## Column Page Right

::: {.column-page-right}
{{< lipsum 1 >}}
:::

## Column Page (Full Width)

::: {.column-page}
{{< lipsum 2 >}}
:::

## Column Page Left

::: {.column-page-left}
{{< lipsum 1 >}}
:::
